---
title: "Terms of Use"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

All content on this website is the intellectual property of the author. Content may be read, shared, and cited for personal, educational, or non-commercial purposes, provided proper attribution is given. When quoting, referencing, or reusing any content from this website, include the author's name, the title of the work, the date, and a link to the original page. Commercial use of any content requires prior written permission from the author.

Content on this website may not be reproduced in full, scraped, or used for AI training, data mining, or any automated data collection without prior written consent.
